title: Citrusy Crisp Chinese Semolina Pilaf
description: This citrusy, crisp, cozy Chinese (Shandong) dish features semolina cooked with an air-fryer for a delightful texture and flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Squeeze of Fresh Citrus Juice (like Tangerine or Lime)

instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine semolina with soy sauce and water. Stir until semolina is fully submerged.
Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently to prevent sticking, for about 8 minutes or until the liquid has evaporated slightly, creating a thicker consistency.
Remove from heat, stir in vegetable oil, ginger paste, garlic powder, sesame seeds, salt, paprika, and red pepper flakes (if using).
Transfer mixture into an air fryer basket. Drizzle with fresh citrus juice evenly over the top of the pilaf.
Air-fry at 200°C for about 8-10 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Let it cool slightly before serving. Garnish with extra sesame seeds if desired.
